result.stdout:
Description:
  Disk Usage Analyzer - Find what's eating your disk space

Usage:
  diskscout [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>            Path to scan (default: current drive)
  -d, --depth <depth>          Maximum scan depth [default: 50]
  -m, --min-size <min-size>    Minimum size to display (e.g., 500KB, 10MB, 1GB) [default: 1MB]
  -t, --top-files <top-files>  Number of largest files to show [default: 20]
  -s, --suggest                Show cleanup suggestions [default: True]
  --no-interactive             Disable interactive drill-down mode
  --no-color                   Disable color output
  -o, --output <output>        Export results to file (use .json or .csv extension)
  -e, --exclude <exclude>      Comma-separated directory names to skip (e.g., node_modules,.git)
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
